name: coTfsLssWaitForSwitchStateSelectiveSequence
title: coTfsLssWaitForSwitchStateSelectiveSequence
syntax: long coTfsLssWaitForSwitchStateSelectiveSequence( dword[] pVendorId, dword[] pProductCode, dword[] pRevisionNo, dword[] pSerialNo );
description: The function waits for a switch state selective messages and sends the response. For a successful test all parameters are to be received within a defined time-out.

parameters.name: pVendorId
parameters.description: Vendor-ID part of the LSS address.
